My account is stuck on verify and I have a premium subscription. I have been trying to verify for 12 hours and yet no one responds to my emails. This is the worst experience I have ever had with Bumble. You have no customer service what so ever! I have used this before and never had a problem. But it's not worth the money I have to pay and you have increased your prices over the last few months! Fix your verification process or get people who know what they are doing!
BEWARE of the FINE PRINT! Disconnecting your payment information isn't enough,you have to find the cleverly hidden way to cancel your subscription or you will continue to be charged!

The app wasn't bad but the experience was. Been on here off and on for a year now and haven't actually met anyone in person. I deleted my account after having a great conversation for about two weeks and then the day before we were to meet the account gets deleted and with the rest you get ghosted. 12/21/23 Created new account and would have kept four star rating but I have received messages saying I have matched or I received a super like but alas it was a lie. Fix your code,it's not that hard
This app is a joke! You can't even see who you match to without paying ridiculous prices!
You can't just force us to use Opening Prompts... I couldn't use the app until I added one. Should not be a required feature,and it should be removable. It provides no value whatsoever
I'm new too it. giving it a go but it looks like it'll drain your wallet with all these different subscriptions
Terrible app I've used it off and on for about 2 years now and only matched with 2 girls,It's mostly bots don't bother downloading

Bumble is a legit app that actually works. It is well worth buying to premium version. If your patient and give it time,you can meet a match. Best app I've used. It is what it claims it is. Again,patience is the key!

They took my monthly payment for premium a day earlier than listed in my Play Store subscriptions,upon trying to cancel,they refused refund which was fair enough,but my premium service has now been stopped,even though I'm effectively paid through to the beginning of March now. Support not replying to emails. As for the service itself,when you get matches,they expire a lot of times because the girl doesn't message first within 24hrs....which is supposed to be the whole USP of this app!
